title.en: HELCOM HEAT (2): Combine the Samples (ADVANCED mode)

description.en: Process to compute the HELCOM Annual Indicator for the HEAT assessment tool. Advanced mode means you can provide Bottle, CTD and/or Pump samples. For any of these, default data is there in case you do not provide any. You can also provide custom spatial units. (Note: If you do not provide any data, the settings for 1877-9999 are used. For any other HOLAS period, please use the HOLAS mode.). This process represents subpart 2 of the original HEAT assessment computation script. For more info, please go to: https://github.com/ices-tools-prod/HEAT/tree/master

links.title: GitHub repo for the original HEAT analysis
